# 📌 Pull Request Title
> Provide a clear and concise title

---

## 📖 Description
> Describe what this PR does and why
- What problem does this solve?
- What changes were made?
- Why is this the best approach?

---

## 🔗 Related Work / Tickets
> Link Jira, Azure DevOps, GitHub Issues, etc.
- Ticket: 
- Epic/Story:
- Related PRs:

---

## 🚀 Type of Change
<!-- Mark relevant options -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] ✨ New Feature
- [ ] ⚡ Performance Improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation Update
- [ ] 🔐 Security Fix
- [ ] 🚨 Breaking Change
- [ ] ⚙️ CI/CD / Pipeline Change
- [ ] ☁️ Infrastructure (Terraform / Cloud)

---

## 🧪 Testing
<!-- Explain how changes were tested -->
- [ ] Unit Tests Added/Updated
- [ ] Integration Tests Added/Updated
- [ ] Manual Testing Completed
- [ ] Regression Testing Completed

### Test Evidence
```
<Add logs/screenshots here>
```

```
<Add screenshots here>
```

## 🔐 Security & Compliance Checklist
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Sensitive data properly masked/encrypted
- [ ] IAM roles and permissions follow least privilege
- [ ] Security scans passed (e.g., SAST, DAST, SCA, IaC)
- [ ] Dependency vulnerabilities reviewed
- [ ] Compliance requirements met (e.g., SOC2, ISO, GDPR)

---

## 🏗 Infrastructure Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Terraform Plan attached/reviewed
- [ ] No destructive changes without approval
- [ ] State changes validated
- [ ] Cost impact assessed
- [ ] Rollback strategy defined

### Terraform Plan Output
```
<Insert terraform plan output>
```

---

## ⚙️ CI/CD Pipeline Impact
- [ ] No pipeline changes
- [ ] Pipeline updated
- [ ] Requires new secrets/variables
- [ ] Deployment strategy modified

---

## 📊 Performance Impact
- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Performance improved
- [ ] Performance degradation risk assessed

---

## ⚠️ Risks & Mitigation
- Risk:
- Mitigation Plan:

---

## 🔄 Rollback Plan
- Steps to rollback:
- Impact of rollback:

---

## 📋 Checklist Before Merge
- [ ] Code follows coding standards & best practices
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Peer review completed
- [ ] All comments resolved
- [ ] CI checks passed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Version bumped (if applicable)
- [ ] Approved by required reviewers
